articles.title: P14.1M in shabu seized, 3 drug suspects arrested in Eastern Visayas ops
articles.description: TACLOBAN CITY, LEYTE, Philippines — Three high-profile drug suspects were arrested, and more than P14.1 million worth of suspected shabu was seized in a series of anti-illegal drug operations conducted by the Police Regional Office 8 (PRO-8) in Eastern Visayas on May 4 and May 5, 2026, as part of the Philippine National Police’s intensified campaign against narcotics. The operations targeted individuals listed on the Regional Priority Target List (RPTL), resulting in the arrest of two top-ranked suspects and one identified high-value individual.
